history.notes: Stricter scoring R4. Fixed: broken bar chart, empty space, arrow nav, connection lines, sparse title, missing cons, chart tooltips, theme toggles
R5: Added SVG connection lines to architecture, era markers + decade nav to timeline, scroll-reveal animations, hover effects. Chart.js theme toggle still partially broken on comparison.

R6 eval: Stricter scoring exposed a11y gaps (all files scored 5). Rebuilt all 6 files: added skip-links, aria-labels, landmark roles, focus indicators, SVG icons replacing emojis, Chart.js destroy/rebuild on theme toggle, mobile breakpoints, scroll-reveal fix (visible by default). Updated SKILL.md with a11y section.

R7: 0 console errors. Responsive clamp() padding on slide decks, filter toolbar on comparison chart, animated connection lines + hover dimming on architecture, prefers-color-scheme detection on all 6 files. Best: ai-timeline 8.50. All scores ≥7.

R8: 0 console errors. Enhanced progress bars (4px + glow), added floating gradient orbs to slide deck backgrounds, confirmed count-up animations + hover states already present. Slide decks still weakest at 7.88. Need bigger changes to push past 9.0.

R9 RESEARCH ROUND: Researched CSS scroll-driven animations, @starting-style, container queries, :has(), color-mix(). Rebuilt all 6 files with: CSS prefers-color-scheme media query, enhanced entrance animations, better responsive breakpoints, Chart.js with hover tooltips, improved a11y. Reset loopsSinceResearch.
R28: Systemic SKILL.md fixes — bumped --text-secondary contrast, added background atmosphere guidance, polished dropdown menu styling, removed translateY hover anti-patterns.

R29: Pre-fix avg 7.73 (15 files, 0 console errors). Best: status-report 8.50, cheatsheet-claude-code 8.13. Lowest: carousel-threads 7.13. SKILL.md fixes: entrance animations (mandatory), theme-adaptive gradients, slide deck light mode, chart accessibility sr-only, --text-secondary consistency. Rebuilt 8 files. Trend: +0.63 from R28. loopsSinceResearch=5, next round triggers RESEARCH.

R30: Calibrated avg 7.85 (evaluator reported 8.75 but inflated ~1pt). 0 console errors across all 15 files. Fixed: carousel-threads sparse cover (added subtitle + SVG icons + animated arrow), quote-card gradient orbs removed (violated SKILL.md), saas-dashboard stray skip-link dot, event-poster QR placeholder replaced with SVG QR pattern. 4 files modified. Trend: +0.12 from R29. loopsSinceResearch=6, next round should trigger RESEARCH.

R31 RESEARCH ROUND: Identified interactivity depth as primary plateau cause. Added to SKILL.md: Popover API (zero-JS info panels), Exclusive <details> Accordion (collapsible groups), CSS Anchor Positioning (tooltips), ::details-content styling, interpolate-size:allow-keywords in skeleton, @page margin boxes for print, Type-Specific Interactivity Requirements table (every file type now has mandatory interaction beyond theme toggle). Key insight: plateau isn't visual quality — it's that all 15 files feel identical with shallow interaction. Next round should rebuild weakest files (status-report, quote-card, event-poster, cheatsheets) with type-specific interactions.

R32: Pre-fix eval avg 6.44 (strict vision-model scoring). 0/15 files used R31 research patterns (popover, details, anchor positioning). Rebuilt 7 files: carousel-threads (new cover design, SVG icons, subtle gradients), event-poster (countdown timer, wider layout), cheatsheet-claude-code (details accordion, search/filter, SVG icons, solid borders), cheatsheet-git (same treatment), quote-card (hover states, better depth), system-architecture (a11y: skip link, aria-labels, landmark roles), comparison-infographic (a11y fix). SKILL.md skeleton updated with details accordion + popover patterns. Trend: -1.41 from R30 (stricter eval calibration via vision model).
